basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Assistant Project Manager Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitk.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree or Graduate Degree with 3 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree or Graduate Degree with 3 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Kanpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Kanpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant Project Manager posts at IIT Kanpur is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree or a Graduate Degree with at least 3 years of relevant experience to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Assistant Project Manager at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Project Manager role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 16,000 to Rs. 38,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Kanpur Assistant Project Manager recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Assistant Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Assistant Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Project Manager position at IIT Kanpur is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur is www.iitk.ac.in, which can be found in the 'Important Links' section.
